title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Tamamo Cross has yet to overcome her
fear of running in packs, she decides to race in
the Japanese Derby, all bandaged and bruised.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Proud to have earned a place among the top
eighteen racers of her generation and determined
to stay strong for her family, she readies herself
for the race.
